questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain how the construction of an oil pipeline through Tanzania could result in market failure (Text C).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The vertical axis may be price but could be costs or benefits. The horizontal axis is quantity. P and Q are sufficient. A title is not necessary.
